meanings.definition: a verbalization that encourages you to attempt something
examples: the ceaseless prodding got on his nerves

meanings.definition: the act of earnestly supporting or encouraging

examples: his importunity left me no alternative but to agree

meanings.definition: force or impel in an indicated direction
examples: I urged him to finish his studies
The travel agent recommended strongly that we not travel on Thanksgiving Day

meanings.definition: spur on or encourage especially by cheers and shouts
examples: The crowd cheered the demonstrating strikers
